summary: Interactive comment system with activity timeline and history view
architectural_notes: Comment system with activity timeline integration
History view with color-coded comment blocks
Maximum 3 comments visible with vertical scroll

existing_features.title: When the user clicks the 'Add Comment' button in ActivitySection, add the comment to the activity timeline section that displays below it, showing the new comment immediately in the timeline
When the user clicks the history icon, populate the activity timeline field that currently displays 'no activity yet' below the Add Comment button with the case's comment history

new_feature_requests.summary: Interactive Add Comment button that adds comments to activity timeline
History icon populates activity timeline below Add Comment button
Comment history with light color-coded blocks, vertical scrolling, max 3 comments visible
Write visual coding specifications in specs section

Display each comment in the comment history enclosed in light color-coded blocks to allow collectors to quickly scan previous comments, with vertical scrolling support and a maximum of 3 comments visible in a single view
Write visual coding specifications in the specs section documenting the comment history UI implementation including color codes, dimensions, spacing, typography, and scrolling behavior
